title: KB Knowledge Gap
description: Emitted by kb audit and kb decay when an empirically_testable entry has no evidence chain, or when a project has an identified research blind spot. Primary consumer: deer-flow gap-dispatch loop which queues a research question and feeds the result back as deer-flow.guidance.fact.v1. UNCONSUMED-IN-SCOPE (2026-07 zombie-event audit): no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry from that vantage point. The deer-flow 'primary consumer' claim above was NOT independently re-verified in this pass and deer-flow is outside this audit's scope — this note confirms the hearth/tengine/tachyonac-engine side is silent, not that deer-flow doesn't listen. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write). See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

entry_id.description: UUID of the vault entry that triggered the gap, if applicable

question.description: Research question that would fill the gap

suggested_deer_query.description: Optional pre-formatted deer-query question for direct dispatch
